hf_only: Input lst must be a list
Input lst must contain hashable elements

agreed.groq: Output list will not contain duplicate elements
agreed.hf: Output will be a list with no duplicates

groq_only: Order of elements in the output list may be different from the input list
hf_only: Output will be a list with the same length as the input list or less

agreed.groq: If input list is empty, output will be an empty list
agreed.hf: If the input list is empty, the output will be an empty list

groq_only: If input list contains unhashable elements, a TypeError will be raised
hf_only: If the input list contains only unique elements, the output will be the same as the input list
